subcodes.first_line: O Khalil! Thy letter was received, and from the fragrances wafting from its garden of inner meanings it was understood that certain [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خلیل مکتوب آنجناب واصل و از نفحات ریاض معانیش چنان مفهوم شد که بعضی
